title: Assistenza all'Aeroporto
opening: Buongiorno, posso esserle d'aiuto? C'è qualcosa in particolare per cui ha bisogno di assistenza?

t1.prompt: Buongiorno, posso esserle d'aiuto? C'è qualcosa in particolare per cui ha bisogno di assistenza?
t1.promptTranslation: Bwon-jor-noh, pos-soh es-seh-reh-leh dah-yoo-toh? Cheh kwahl-koh-zah een par-tee-koh-lah-reh pehr kwee ah bee-zo-nyoh dee as-sees-ten-zah? — Good morning, can I help you? Is there anything in particular you need assistance with?

t2.prompt: Mi dispiace per l'inconveniente. Per cortesia, potrebbe fornirmi il numero del volo o la destinazione?
t2.promptTranslation: Mee dees-pyah-cheh pehr leen-kohn-veh-nyen-teh. Pehr kor-teh-zee-ah, poh-treh-beh for-neer-mee eel noo-meh-roh dehl voh-loh oh lah des-tee-nah-tsyo-neh? — I'm sorry for the inconvenience. Could you please provide me with your flight number or destination?

t3.prompt: Capisco, è una situazione piuttosto spiacevole. Ha già compilato il modulo di smarrimento o è la prima volta che lo segnala?
t3.promptTranslation: Kah-pees-koh, eh oo-nah see-too-ah-tsyo-neh pyoot-tos-toh spee-ah-cheh-voh-leh. Ah jah kohm-pee-lah-toh eel moh-doo-loh dee zmar-ree-men-toh oh eh lah pree-mah vohl-tah keh loh seh-nyah-lah? — I understand, that's quite an unpleasant situation. Have you already filled out the lost luggage form, or is this the first time you're reporting it?

t4.prompt: Certamente. Di che tipo di informazioni ha bisogno? Riguardo al check-in, al gate, ai servizi dell'aeroporto?
t4.promptTranslation: Chehr-tah-men-teh. Dee keh tee-poh dee een-for-mah-tsyo-nee ah bee-zo-nyoh? Ree-gwar-doh ahl chehk-een, ahl geh-teh, ah-ee ser-vee-tzee dehl-lah-eh-roh-por-toh? — Certainly. What kind of information do you need? Regarding check-in, the gate, or airport services?

t5.prompt: Grazie. Un momento, per favore, mentre verifico le informazioni sul suo volo. Ah, vedo che il volo [XX123] per [Città] è previsto in partenza dal Gate B12 alle 14:30. C'è altro che posso fare per lei?
t5.promptTranslation: Grah-tsee-eh. Oon moh-men-toh, pehr fah-voh-reh, men-treh veh-ree-fee-koh leh een-for-mah-tsyo-nee sool soo-oh voh-loh. Ah, veh-doh keh eel voh-loh [XX123] pehr [Cheet-tah] eh preh-vee-stoh een par-ten-zah dahl Geh-teh Bee-doo-eh-dee-chee ahl-leh kwah-toh-dee-chee-eh-tren-tah. Cheh ahl-troh keh pos-soh fah-reh pehr leh-ee? — Thank you. One moment, please, while I check your flight information. Ah, I see that flight [XX123] to [City] is scheduled to depart from Gate B12 at 2:30 PM. Is there anything else I can do for you?

t6.prompt: Perfetto. In quel caso, le consiglio di recarsi all'ufficio Lost & Found per verificare lo stato della sua pratica. L'ufficio si trova al piano terra, vicino agli arrivi internazionali. Ha bisogno di indicazioni più precise?
t6.promptTranslation: Pehr-fet-toh. Een kwel kah-zoh, leh kohn-see-lyoh dee reh-kahr-see ahl-loof-fee-choh Lost & Found pehr veh-ree-fee-kahr loh stah-toh dehl-lah soo-ah prah-tee-kah. L'oof-fee-choh see troh-vah ahl pyah-noh tehr-rah, vee-chee-noh ah-lyee ahr-ree-vee een-tehr-nah-tsyo-nah-lee. Ah bee-zo-nyoh dee een-dee-kah-tsyo-nee pyoo preh-chee-zeh? — Perfect. In that case, I recommend you go to the Lost & Found office to check the status of your claim. The office is on the ground floor, near international arrivals. Do you need more precise directions?

t7.prompt: D'accordo. Deve compilare il modulo di smarrimento bagaglio all'ufficio Lost & Found. Si trova al piano terra, seguendo le indicazioni per 'Ritiro Bagagli' e poi 'Oggetti Smarriti'. Le serve altro?
t7.promptTranslation: Dahk-kor-doh. Deh-veh kohm-pee-lah-reh eel moh-doo-loh dee zmar-ree-men-toh bah-gah-lyoh ahl-loof-fee-choh Lost & Found. See troh-vah ahl pyah-noh tehr-rah, seh-gwen-doh leh een-dee-kah-tsyo-nee pehr 'Ree-tee-roh Bah-gah-lyee' eh pwoy 'Oh-jet-tee Zmar-ree-tee'. Leh sehr-veh ahl-troh? — Alright. You need to fill out the lost luggage form at the Lost & Found office. It's on the ground floor, following the signs for 'Baggage Claim' and then 'Lost & Found'. Do you need anything else?

t8.prompt: Certo. Per il check-in, se non l'ha già fatto online, può recarsi ai banchi della sua compagnia aerea. I numeri dei banchi sono solitamente indicati sui monitor. Per il gate, le suggerisco di controllare il suo biglietto o i tabelloni delle partenze. Ha altre domande?
t8.promptTranslation: Chehr-toh. Pehr eel chehk-een, seh non lah jah fat-toh ohn-lyne, pwò reh-kahr-see ah-ee bahn-kee dehl-lah soo-ah kohm-pah-nyee-ah ah-eh-reh-ah. Ee noo-meh-ree deh-ee bahn-kee soh-lee-tah-men-teh een-dee-kah-tee soo-ee moh-nee-tor. Pehr eel geh-teh, leh sooj-jeh-rees-koh dee kohn-trol-lah-reh eel soo-oh bee-lyet-toh oh ee tah-bel-loh-nee del-leh par-ten-zeh. Ah ahl-treh doh-mahn-deh? — Certainly. For check-in, if you haven't already done it online, you can go to your airline's counters. Counter numbers are usually displayed on monitors. For the gate, I suggest you check your ticket or the departure boards. Do you have any other questions?

t-repeat.prompt: Mi scusi, non ho capito bene. Potrebbe ripetere, per favore?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Mee skoo-zee, non oh kah-pee-toh beh-neh. Poh-treh-beh ree-peh-teh-reh, pehr fah-voh-reh? — Excuse me, I didn't quite understand. Could you please repeat, please?

t-end.prompt: Prego, le auguro un buon viaggio e arrivederci!
t-end.promptTranslation: Preh-goh, leh ah-oo-goo-roh oon bwon vee-ahj-joh eh ahr-ree-veh-dehr-chee! — You're welcome, I wish you a good trip and goodbye!
